articles.title: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson launches Wyoming Political Action Committee
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, co-founder of Input Output (IO) and the man behind the Cardano blockchain, officially launched the Wyoming Integrity Political Action Committee (PAC) on Jan. 31. Based in Cheyenne, Wyoming, this new initiative will reportedly target ethical procurement in the state’s government contracts and tech projects. The goal is to make sure no one cheats […]

articles.title: Bitcoin’s Next Rally Around the Corner as Stablecoin Liquidity Expands: CryptoQuant
articles.description: With expanding stablecoin liquidity historically linked to price gains, another Bitcoin rally may be on the horizon because USDT and USDC market caps have been increasing.

articles.title: European Central Bank president: Bitcoin lacks reserve potential
articles.description: As central banks mull Bitcoin's potential as a reserve asset, the head of the ECB emphasizes its risks.
